text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text:
Okay, I'm still good to go. It's time to go buono and
power on through!

text_block_list.name: Hishi Akebono
text_block_list.text: Oh, Trainer! Don't worry, it's nothing!

text_block_list.name: Monologue
text_block_list.text:
Although Hishi Akebono says she's fine, it seems
like she's putting up a tough front. I should
probably revise her race schedule.
